Fleld Communlcator: This model is more powerful and capa ble than tne military communicator and Is typically used by field commanders t0 coordinate with theirunits and superiors. advanced systems allow the user t0 simultaneously monitor up to six different channels; send and receive data burst transmis sions and even transmit video Irom camera an electronic scope (such as NVD goggles telescopic sights). This commu nicator can also act as repeater, receiving specific coded sig; nals and automatically re transmitting them, either on the same frequency Or on different one up t0 twenty-five kilometers Long-Range   Communicatlons Kit: Normally used comoany and higher; long-range kits not only have the best overland range of any man-portable communications device but can also make contact with spaceborne vessels and satellites This long-range kit can simultaneously monitor more than two dozen frequencies and can transmit and receive video signals, in addition to all of the other capabilities 0f the field communi cator. Two dishes provide the means for orbital microwave Or laser communications offering   effectively unlimited range though characters must attach support laser t0 the kitin order t0 make Iaser transmissions t0 orbiting cratt.
metal   such armor plates and structural pieces tns has become standard gear for many pilots and soldiers In cutting mode; the Iaser torch expends its power usC rating every turn_ and in that time can make ten centimeter-long cut through centimeterthick piece steel. In welding mode consumes half its power rating every lun but can only join iive cen" timeters of metal together that time.
Repair Kits While basic tool kits are enough to make simple repairs_ Iney tall tar short when cores t0 fixing advanced pieces 0f equipment such as BattleMechs and aerospace fighters Each particular type of system requires particular skills to use and its own set of specialized tools ad spare parts Repair kits are Iar too massive t0 be carried, requiring their Own carts These kits mmst be restocked every three months assuming the kits are used weekly t0 either repair Or maintain the advanced equip ment; Restocking costs 20 percent of the origina price of the Repair kits come in following types: aerospace, cut ting /joining_ electronics_ myomer /actuator. vehicle and weapon_ Weapon Cleaning / Service Kits: No matter how reliable weapon alter days Or wceks 0f constant use witnout clean will jam fail; Every foot soldier carries the basic tools to keep his weapon in good shape Tne basic skills clean and service weapons arc included with the weapon skills them selves Characters with tne Gunsmith or appropriate Technician Skills can also use these kits to adjust modily their weapons Both energy weapon and slug thrower kits are available each kit has everytning soldier needs keep (requently used weapon clean ad functioning for up to year The kit can be refilled for 25 percent of the cost of the entire kit:
TOOLS The tool kits and equipment listed below contain just about everything tech or mechanic would need other than spare parts repair almost any piece 0f advanced machinery;
Basic Tools Many repairs ad modifications can be accomplished with rudimentary tools Almost anyone who drives pilots vehicle keeps tool kit nandy just in case_ and tinkerers and handymen use these kits t0 make their moditications Or build tneir projects. Basic Tool Kit: This contains variety of simple tools and fittings commonly used repairs and construction projects. This kit also includes tool belt/vest combination with enough hooks and compartments t0 hold all of the included tools and supplies. character performing any Technician Skill needs such kit to avoid Lack of Proper Equipment Modifier Certain large jobs will require repair kit at the gamemaster $ discretion. Deluxe Tool Klt: Where the basic tool kit is enough for sim- ple jobs, the deluxe tool kit contains everything else profes sional mechanic Or tradesman needs Many of the basic tools are duplicated this kit, but multitude of additiona special: ized tools, including many powered tools and accessories are also included_ Tne deluxe tool kit comes with Its own portable storage container; character performing any Technician Skill not only avoids Lack of Proper Equiprent Modifier but also gains TN Modifier for using deluxe kit. Certain large jobs will require repair kit at the gamemaster'= discretion Hand-Held Laser Torch: The personal laser torch has fast become one of  the most   popular tools on  the battlefield Immensely useful for both cutting apart ad welding pieces of
Electronics Noteputer: Thougn not used specifically to repair dam- aged piece of machinery: the ubiquitous noteputer iS every bit useful as spanners and saws Characters can use this t0 ref erence electronic books compose letters; send and receive data messages (if connected to communications device . play games even play musi Ano vid-chips. Commonly measuring fifteen centimeters square_ most models can be  folded and stored in pockets and most have Ine capability t0 read from ana write standard data chips Personal Computer: Much larger than simple notepuler; personal computers perform all the same functions but are less expensive and usually morc capable. When using Academic Skills conducting research characters can gain skill modi: fiers for using persona computer with access the appro priate solware at the gamemaster discretion Scanalyzer: This powerful analytical device used by doc: tors and engineers Characters insert small amount of the material they wish to analyze into the scanalyzer: After 406 turns analyzing; the device produces list of the substance' mental and molecular components_ its flash ad melting points. conductivily and radioactivity and host of other reports_ The scanalyzer barely smaller than standard briefcase, making
